data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of recording for asynchronous viewers, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation or details regarding the actual implementation of recording functionality. The absence of evidence supporting the existence of this feature indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of recording functionality for asynchronous viewers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
